name: Integration - End-to-End Incident Classification Workflow
description: Tests the full workflow from API request through IncidentProcessor, LLMService, CatalogIntegration, AuditLogger, and ErrorHandler.
input: POST /classify with valid IncidentRequest; all dependencies mocked or stubbed for LLM, catalog, and audit logging.
output: IncidentResponse with all fields populated, audit log entry created, and trace steps executed.
success_criteria: trace_step context managers are entered and exited
